summary: Venture Global Inc. shares shot up on Tuesday after the liquefied natural gas exporter announced two new supply deals and detailed expansion plans for export projects in Louisiana.

summary: Swedish buyout firm EQT AB is tapping funding from the Qatari sovereign fund as it prepares to make a binding bid for Volkswagen AG’s large marine engine unit by a deadline next month, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: KKR-Backed Ambulance Firm GMR Shrinks IPO Target to $479 Million
title_cn: KKR 支持的救护车公司 GMR 将 IPO 目标缩减至 4.79 亿美元
summary: GMR Solutions Inc., an air and ground emergency medical services company that counts KKR & Co. among its backers, revised the terms of its IPO and is seeking to raise $479 million, down from an earlier target of as much as $798 million.

title: Jeffrey Epstein’s Ex-Deutsche Bank Wealth Manager Leaves US Firm
title_cn: 杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的前德意志银行财富经理离开美国公司
summary: One of Jeffrey Epstein’s former top Deutsche Bank AG relationship managers left a financial services firm with ties to ultra-wealthy individuals caught up in US government files on the late financier.

title: EQT Tests Intertek’s Resolve for a Final Time
title_cn: EQT 最后一次测试 Intertek 的决心
summary: Intertek has received a fourth and final offer from its private equity suitor.

title: Europe Struggling to Draw up Critical Minerals Battle Plan
title_cn: 欧洲努力制定关键矿产作战计划
summary: The continent has at times been slow to support the extraction and refinement of certain materials that are crucial for the defense industry. China and the US, meanwhile, are sprinting ahead.

title: DeepMind Spinout Isomorphic Labs Raises $2.1 Billion to Design Drugs With AI
title_cn: DeepMind Spinout Isomorphic Labs 融资 21 亿美元，利用人工智能设计药物
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Isomorphic Labs raised $2.1 billion in its second round of outside capital, with new support from sovereign wealth funds, as it seeks to make artificial intelligence-designed drugs a reality.

title: Macron Seeks New African Friends Across Language Barrier
title_cn: 马克龙跨越语言障碍寻找新的非洲朋友
summary: East Africa represents one of the few remaining growth frontiers where France believes it can expand its footprint.

title: Von der Leyen’s Power Grab Is Undermining EU Progress
title_cn: 冯德莱恩的权力攫取正在破坏欧盟的进步
summary: Commission president’s micromanagement linked to broader failure to advance bloc’s agenda

title: Billionaire Ambani-Led Reliance Pays National Champion Price
title_cn: 亿万富翁安巴尼领导的 Reliance 支付全国冠军价格
summary: Reliance redirected gas supplies, stopped buying Russian oil, and is now reworking Jio’s IPO.

title: US Inflation Accelerates, Iran Truce Remains Fragile, More
title_cn: 美国通胀加速，伊朗休战仍然脆弱，更多
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Talking Transports: Morgan Stanley on Transport Disruption Risks
title_cn: 谈论交通：摩根士丹利谈交通中断风险
summary: Amazon.com’s expanding logistics ambitions are poised to disrupt multiple transportation segments, from parcel to brokerage and LTL. In this Talking Transports podcast, Morgan Stanley Managing Director Ravi Shanker joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s senior transportation and logistics analyst Lee Klaskow to discuss how Amazon’s scale and asset-light approach could pressure incumbents across freight markets. Shanker outlines structural challenges in parcel, including the unsustainability of free ship

title: Tech Disruptors: Atlassian CEO on Human-AI Agent Collaboration
title_cn: 技术颠覆者：Atlassian 首席执行官谈人类与人工智能代理协作
summary: AI agents are reshaping enterprise workflows, increasing the importance of organizational context and connected data. Atlassian CEO and co-founder Mike Cannon-Brookes joins Bloomberg Intelligence senior software analyst Sunil Rajgopal to discuss how Atlassian is embedding AI across Jira, Confluence and service-management tools through its Rovo platform and Teamwork Graph. “The future is about human and agent collaboration,” Cannon-Brookes says. The discussion also covers enterprise AI adoption,

title: Inside Active: State Street’s Paglia on Performance and Scale
title_cn: Inside Active：道富银行 Paglia 的绩效和规模
summary: Over the past decade, expanded market access through ETFs and new structures has raised questions about capacity, outcomes and what it means for active management. In this episode of the Inside Active podcast, host David Cohne, mutual fund and active management analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, speaks with Anna Paglia, executive vice president and chief business officer for State Street Investment Management, about how the industry is moving beyond the traditional active-versus-passive debate a

title: Tech Firm CGI Picks Tim Hurlebaus as CEO After AI Fears Crush Share Price
title_cn: 科技公司 CGI 在人工智能担心股价下跌后任命蒂姆·赫尔勒鲍斯 (Tim Hurlebaus) 为首席执行官
summary: Shares of Canadian IT consulting firm CGI Inc. extended their losses over 40% in one year after it appointed a new chief executive officer, a slump largely due to concerns about disruption from artificial intelligence upstarts such as Anthropic PBC.

title: Gold Slides Lower as US Inflation Clouds Fed Easing Outlook
title_cn: 由于美国通胀给美联储宽松前景蒙上阴影，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as the latest US economic data showed inflation accelerated on rising energy and food prices, reducing odds of monetary easing by the Federal Reserve this year.

title: Chip Stocks Down on Momentum and Not CPI, Bokeh's Forrest Says
title_cn: Bokeh 的 Forrest 表示，芯片股下跌是受动力而非 CPI 影响
summary: Kim Forrest, Bokeh Capital Partners chief investment officer, says Tuesday's selloff is just a pause in momentum for skyrocketing chip stocks, not a shock from a hotter-than-estimated inflation report. She speaks with Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US to Unveil New Data Spotlighting Hormuz and Global Reserves
title_cn: 美国将公布霍尔木兹和全球储备的新数据
summary: The US government’s energy statistics agency will start releasing new data on the world’s strategic reserves and flows of petroleum and liquefied natural gas through shipping choke points.

title: Chip Stocks Sink as Inflation Woes Boost US Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 通胀困境提振美国收益率，芯片股下跌：市场休整
summary: A selloff in high-flying chipmakers drove stocks lower, with the market also falling alongside bonds after inflation data showed the impacts of energy disruptions stemming from the war in Iran.

title: Chile’s Populist Renegade Is Getting His Way on Kast’s Big Bill
title_cn: 智利的民粹主义叛徒正在卡斯特的大法案上得逞
summary: Chile’s Franco Parisi, the third-place finisher in last year’s presidential election, is proving to be a formidable political operative, strong-arming the government to accept his populist initiatives in exchange for supporting its economic agenda.

title: Inflation to Peak in May or June, Gapen Says
title_cn: 加彭称通胀将在五月或六月达到峰值
summary: Morgan Stanley Chief US Economist expects US inflation to peak this year in May or June. He says the latest CPI report will keep the Federal Reserve on the sidelines for the rest of this year. He speaks on Bloomberg Surveillance.

title: Kazakh CPC Oil Exports to Drop as Europe Faces Tight Supplies
title_cn: 欧洲面临供应紧张，哈萨克斯坦CPC石油出口将下降
summary: Kazakhstan will cut crude exports from a key Russian Black Sea port next month at a time when European refineries are already grappling with an unprecedented supply disruption from the Middle East.

title: Biggest US Grid May Be Too Large to Function, Regulator Says
title_cn: 监管机构称美国最大电网可能太大而无法正常运行
summary: PJM Interconnection LLC, the biggest power grid in the US, may have become too big to adequately function and needs urgent reform, Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Chair Laura Swett said at the grid operator’s annual meeting.

title: Alphabet Offers Eight-Tranche Deal in Its Debut Yen Bond Sale
title_cn: Alphabet 在首次日元债券发售中提供八批次交易
summary: Alphabet Inc. has begun marketing its first-ever bond sale in yen, further broadening its funding channels as the Google parent sharply increases capital spending to finance artificial intelligence efforts.

title: JPMorgan Fully Committed to EU,  EMEA Co-Head Wiltz Says
title_cn: 摩根大通欧洲、中东和非洲地区联席主管威尔茨表示，摩根大通完全致力于欧盟
summary: Matthieu Wiltz, JPMorgan EMEA co-CEO, says M&A, equity and debt capital markets, and leveraged finance had a “booming” first quarter with a solid pipeline, and that investor appetite and cash levels support decent performance in coming months despite geopolitical uncertainty. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Soy Growers Want Commitments From China as Season Slips Away
title_cn: 随着季节的流逝，美国大豆种植者希望得到中国的承诺
summary: As US President Donald Trump travels to Beijing for a summit this week with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, American soybean farmers are in a now-familiar spot: Fields are getting planted when demand from their biggest customer is uncertain.

title: Ex-Eaton Vance CEO Takes Majority Stake in Mutual Fund Rescuer
title_cn: 前伊顿万斯首席执行官持有共同基金救助者的多数股权
summary: Thomas Faust, who engineered the sale of Eaton Vance to Morgan Stanley, is beginning his next act: helping out mutual fund managers who are facing redemption requests.

title: Treasuries Fall as Rising Oil Prices Herald Sticky Inflation
title_cn: 油价上涨预示着粘性通胀，国债下跌
summary: Treasuries fell as rising oil prices threatened to keep inflation at levels that could prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates next year.

title: Copper Rallies Above $14,000 a Ton, Nearing Fresh All-Time High
title_cn: 铜价升至每吨 14,000 美元上方，接近历史新高
summary: Copper jumped above $14,000 a ton, closing in on a record high as a rebound in Chinese demand and mounting supply risks outweigh concerns about the Iran war’s impact on global growth.

title: Dimon Says JPMorgan Would Scrap New UK HQ Over Higher Bank Taxes
title_cn: 戴蒙表示摩根大通将因银行税提高而废弃英国新总部
summary: Jamie Dimon warned the UK that any move to hike taxes on banks in the event Keir Starmer is replaced as the UK’s prime minster would see JPMorgan Chase & Co. scrap plans to invest billions in a new London headquarters in Canary Wharf.

title: Oil Extends Gain as Trump Casts Doubt Over Ceasefire With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普对与伊朗的停火表示怀疑，油价扩大涨幅
summary: Oil pushed higher as US President Donald Trump cast doubt over the ceasefire with Iran after rejecting Tehran’s latest peace offer, prolonging the effective closure of the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Household Debt Delinquencies Stay Flat in First Quarter
title_cn: 第一季度美国家庭债务拖欠率持平
summary: The share of overdue consumer loans stayed flat in the first quarter of 2026 as new delinquencies edged down.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/12/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 12 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Energy Supply to Dominate Indian Prime Minister Modi’s UAE Visit
title_cn: 能源供应将成为印度总理莫迪访问阿联酋的重点
summary: Energy will dominate Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit to the United Arab Emirates on Friday as India moves to shore up stable supplies amid rising geopolitical tensions in West Asia.

title: Supply-Chain Stress That Peaked in Covid Heads Higher Again
title_cn: 新冠疫情期间达到顶峰的供应链压力再次加剧
summary: The impact of the energy crisis on the global economy in recent months is showing up in gauges of supply-chain stress that flashed red during the pandemic, adding to reasons for central banks to be on guard for a recurrence of high inflation.

title: Vietnam Urges US Navy to Let Oil Tanker Through Its Blockade
title_cn: 越南敦促美国海军允许油轮通过封锁
summary: Vietnam’s state oil company urged the US to let a supertanker pass through an American naval blockade outside of the Persian Gulf, saying the shipment is critical to the Asian country’s economy.

title: DoorDash Poses Disruption Risk to Payments Firms, Analyst Says
title_cn: 分析师称 DoorDash 给支付公司带来颠覆风险
summary: An expected point-of-sale technology rollout from DoorDash Inc. is poised to deal a blow to payments firms such as Toast Inc., according to Rothschild & Co Redburn’s Dominic Ball.

title: Under Armour Slides on Guidance Miss; Wendy's Up on Private Operator Bid | Stock Movers
title_cn: Under Armour 在 Guidance Miss 上滑行；温迪 (Wendy's) 接受私人运营商竞标库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Under Armour (UAA) shares are sliding after it forecast adjusted earnings per share for 2027 and the guidance missed the average analyst estimate.
- Wendy's (WEN) shares are gaining as Financial Times reports that Nelson Peltz’s Trian Fund Management is seeking investor backing for a bid to take the burger chain operator private.
- Hims & Hers (HIMS) shares are lower after reporting a first-quarter loss and sales that missed Wall Street estimates due to higher costs associated with its strategic pivot to branded weight-loss medications. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Inflation Accelerates as Gas, Food Prices Climb
title_cn: 随着天然气和食品价格上涨，美国通胀加速
summary:
US inflation accelerated in April on rising gasoline and grocery costs, exceeding wage growth in a double-whammy for already strained consumers.
Eric Winograd, Chief US Economist at AllianceBernstein, reacts to the CPI data. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Mania Makes Old-School Industrials Behave Like Chip Stocks
title_cn: 人工智能狂热使传统工业表现得像芯片股
summary: Optimism surrounding the potential for industrial companies to profit from the artificial intelligence boom has fueled record-setting momentum in the sector. Now worries are mounting that the group’s link to AI may be getting too tight.

title: Amazon Sells Swiss Franc Bond Offering in Record Six Parts
title_cn: 亚马逊售出创纪录的六份瑞士法郎债券
summary: Amazon.com Inc. sold its first Swiss franc bonds across a record six tranches, as Big Tech looks beyond its regular debt markets to raise funds.

title: Dimon Says Effects of Iran War Are Getting More Serious Each Day
title_cn: 戴蒙表示伊朗战争的影响日益严重
summary: JPMorgan Chase Chairman and CEO Jamie Dimon says the effects of the Iran war are getting more serious each day. He also says the wealthier American consumer "is spending like they should." He speaks to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the bank’s annual Global Markets Conference in Paris.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea Roils Market by Floating ‘Citizen Dividend’ From AI
title_cn: 韩国通过人工智能带来的“公民红利”搅动市场
summary: A top South Korean policymaker said the nation should pay citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits, underscoring growing pressure to redistribute gains from a boom that’s enriched chipmakers like Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc.

title: Why AI Matters More Than Iran War in Markets
title_cn: 为什么人工智能在市场上比伊朗战争更重要
summary: Global equities have rallied to record levels, fuelled by euphoria over artificial intelligence. Investors' risk appetite has held up despite volatility in energy markets caused by the war in Iran. Bloomberg Markets Live Executive Editor Mark Cudmore and Bloomberg TV Markets Producer Anthony Stephens discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google in Talks to Use SpaceX to Launch Space Data Centers, Report Says
title_cn: 报道称，谷歌正在洽谈使用 SpaceX 发射太空数据中心
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is in talks with Elon Musk’s SpaceX to launch the search company’s orbital data centers, the Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday.

title: CME to Create Futures Market for Computing Power Backing AI
title_cn: CME 将创建支持人工智能的算力期货市场
summary: US derivatives exchange CME Group Inc. and index provider Silicon Data are teaming up to create a futures market for computing power, a key source driving the AI boom.

title: Stocks Sink on Hotter-Than-Forecast Core CPI Print, Jump in Oil
title_cn: 核心消费者物价指数 (CPI) 较预期热，股市下跌，石油价格上涨
summary: Traders pulled back from risk assets, with a torrid run in US equities hitting a wall as April inflation data came in hotter than economists’ estimates and worsening tensions between Washington and Iran sent oil prices higher.

title: Delivery Hero CEO to Resign After Activist Raises Stake
title_cn: 激进分子增持股份后，送货英雄首席执行官辞职
summary: Niklas Östberg, the chief executive officer of German food delivery company Delivery Hero SE, will step down after an activist investor that’s called for him to leave raised its stake in the company.

title: Waymo Recalls Robotaxis After Vehicle Drove on Flooded Road
title_cn: Waymo 召回机器人出租车，因车辆在被洪水淹没的道路上行驶
summary: Waymo is recalling thousands of robotaxis to fix a software issue that could cause the autonomous vehicles to drive on flooded roads.

title: JPMorgan’s Dimon Weighs In on Markets, Iran War and AI
title_cn: 摩根大通的戴蒙对市场、伊朗战争和人工智能发表了看法
summary: JPMorgan Chase Chair and CEO Jamie Dimon discusses the state of global financial markets and the impact of the conflict in Iran. Speaking with Bloomberg’s Francine Lacqua on “Bloomberg Open Interest,” Dimon also comments on the use of artificial intelligence and European banking regulations.

title: AI Dictation Startup Wispr in Funding Talks at $2 Billion Value
title_cn: AI 听写初创公司 Wispr 正在进行价值 20 亿美元的融资谈判
summary: Wispr AI Inc., the developer behind the popular voice dictation tool Wispr Flow, is in talks to raise a new round of funding that could more than double its valuation to $2 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: EBay Rejects GameStop’s $56 Billion Takeover Bid
title_cn: eBay 拒绝 GameStop 560 亿美元的收购要约
summary: EBay turned down GameStop Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen’s $56 billion takeover offer, describing the unsolicited bid as “neither credible nor attractive.” Caroline Hyde reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Will Change Almost Everything, Jamie Dimon Says
title_cn: 杰米·戴蒙表示，人工智能将改变几乎一切
summary: JPMorgan Chase Chairman and CEO Jamie Dimon says AI will change almost everything. He talks about how he uses the tech on a daily basis and speaks to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the bank’s annual Global Markets Conference in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: VC Firm Takes Less-Is-More Approach With $450 Million Fund
title_cn: 风险投资公司采用“少即是多”的方法，设立 4.5 亿美元基金
summary: Kevin Hartz, a co-founder of Eventbrite and longtime startup investor, has watched as venture capital firms unveil multibillion-dollar funds to back cash-hungry AI companies at every stage of their lifecycles. He’s taking a different approach.A-Star, the early-stage venture firm Hartz launched with former Coatue investor Bennett Siegel, is set to announce on Tuesday that it’s raised $450 million for its third fund — its largest to date, but a far cry from the $15 billion fund that Andreessen Hor

title: Sea Fends Off E-Commerce Rivals to Beat Profit Estimates
title_cn: Sea击退电子商务竞争对手，利润超出预期
summary: Sea Ltd. reported quarterly earnings that topped analysts’ estimates after warding off rivals in Southeast Asia’s competitive e-commerce market rattled by economic and political challenges.

title: EBay Spurns GameStop’s Offer as Not Credible or Attractive
title_cn: eBay 拒绝 GameStop 的报价，认为其不可信或不具吸引力
summary: EBay Inc. rejected a $56 billion takeover offer from GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen, describing the unsolicited bid as “neither credible nor attractive.”

title: Intel’s $440 Billion Six-Week Surge Has Short Sellers Circling
title_cn: 英特尔六周飙升 4400 亿美元，引来卖空者围观
summary: A scorching rally in Intel Corp. shares is threatening huge losses for traders wagering that they’re due to fall. But that isn’t stopping them from placing those bets.

title: Software Firm ServiceNow Kicks Off Bond Sale to Fund Armis Deal
title_cn: 软件公司 ServiceNow 启动债券发售，为 Armis 交易提供资金
summary: ServiceNow Inc. is offering US high-grade bonds to help fund the software firm’s recent takeover of cybersecurity startup Armis.

title: Prosus Dips as Just East, iFood Guidance Is Weaker Than Expected
title_cn: Prosus 因 East、iFood 指引弱于预期而下跌
summary: Prosus NV fell to the lowest in more than a year after the Dutch technology investor released an update that analysts said showed the guidance for food-delivery units Just Eat Takeaway.com and iFood was weaker than expected.

title: NetEase Veteran Raises $100 Million, Backs Gaming Royalty for ‘Star-Wars’-Led Comeback
title_cn: 网易老将筹集 1 亿美元，支持游戏版税以支持“星球大战”主导的卷土重来
summary: Simon Zhu’s new GreaterThan Group is investing in revered video-game creators, including ‘Mass Effect’ director Casey Hudson

title: Deutsche Bank, Nasdaq Back Crypto Firm Elliptic in $120 Million Round
title_cn: 德意志银行和纳斯达克以 1.2 亿美元投资加密货币公司 Elliptic
summary: Blockchain analytics firm Elliptic Enterprises Ltd. has raised $120 million in a new funding round backed by Deutsche Bank AG and Nasdaq Inc.’s venture arm, as large financial institutions expand their digital-asset offerings.

title: EDF Said to Plan Sale of Chinese Renewables Amid Nuclear Shift
title_cn: 据称，法国电力公司计划在核转型之际出售中国可再生能源
summary: Electricite de France SA is working with an adviser to sell its renewable energy assets in China as the French state-owned utility refocuses on European nuclear power projects, people familiar with the matter said.

title: SAP Invests in AI Automation Startup N8n at $5.2 Billion Value
title_cn: SAP 以 52 亿美元投资人工智能自动化初创公司 N8n
summary: SAP SE is investing in workflow automation platform n8n, doubling the startup’s valuation to $5.2 billion, as the German software giant builds out its artificial intelligence offering.

title: Instructure Reaches Deal With Hackers to Return Canvas User Data
title_cn: Instruct 与黑客达成协议，归还 Canvas 用户数据
summary: Instructure Inc. said it reached an agreement with hackers who disrupted universities’ online coursework and testing on the company’s Canvas platform, with the attackers returning stolen data and pledging not to extort the education software maker’s customers.

title: BlackRock’s Koesterich Sees an Earnings Driven Market Enticing Investors
title_cn: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的 Koesterich 认为盈利驱动的市场吸引着投资者
summary: Russ Koesterich, Global Allocation Fund portfolio manager at BlackRock, says investors don’t want to miss out on “remarkable” earnings and sees bond yields as “relatively contained” in the United States. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan's Sanjay Jhamna: Software Shock is Over
title_cn: 摩根大通的 Sanjay Jhamna：软件冲击已经结束
summary: Private credit may have been hit by negative headlines, but inflows are unquestionably strong, says Sanjay Jhamna, Head of Global Credit Trading at JPMorgan. He says the fact that recent AI model releases did not result in a negative market reaction shows that the shock has passed for the software sector. Jhamna joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" at the JPMorgan's Global Markets Conference in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia’s Absence From China Trip Shows Trump Hand: Tech In Depth
title_cn: 英伟达缺席中国之行表明特朗普的手：科技深度报道
summary: It’s not easy to remain in the president’s ever-rotating orbit

title: China Earns $500 Million an Hour From Exports Supercharged by AI
title_cn: 中国通过人工智能推动出口每小时赚取 5 亿美元
summary: The US and Chinese economies may still be on their way to decoupling but both are drawing strength from the same source.

title: JD Profit Beats Estimates After China Curbs Food Delivery War
title_cn: 中国遏制外卖大战后京东利润超出预期
summary: JD.com Inc. reported better-than-expected profit after Beijing clamped down on its fierce food delivery battle with Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Meituan.

title: Water Made From Air Aims to Help Drought-Ravaged Communities
title_cn: 由空气制成的水旨在帮助遭受干旱蹂躏的社区
summary: As water risks are exposed by the Iran War and AI data centers, startup Atoco is preparing production of a device that can produce 4,000 liters daily. Katie Meyer has more.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Says Trend Toward Non-US Debt Is Accelerating
title_cn: 高盛称非美国债务趋势正在加速
summary: Amanda Lynam, chief credit strategist at Goldman Sachs, says the scale of investment in artificial intelligence is forcing corporates to increasingly diversify their funding outside the US. She speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Confirmed to Fed Board, Still Awaiting Vote on Chair Post
title_cn: 沃什已被任命为美联储董事会成员，但仍在等待主席职位的投票
summary: The Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh’s nomination to the Federal Reserve Board of Governors Tuesday, with the chamber expected to confirm him separately as chair later this week.

title: Dimon Says US, Europe Have to Fix 'Stupid' Trade Issues
title_cn: 戴蒙表示美国和欧洲必须解决“愚蠢”的贸易问题
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Chief Executive Officer Jamie Dimon said fixing “stupid” trade issues between the US and Europe would pave the way for better growth. He also says the US would benefit from a stronger NATO. He speaks to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the bank’s annual Global Markets Conference in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Team Pauses Effort to Lower Tariffs on Beef Imports
title_cn: 特朗普团队暂停降低牛肉进口关税的努力
summary: The Trump administration has delayed a plan to suspend tariffs on beef imports, which had been part of its latest push to assuage Americans’ concerns about high consumer prices.

title: EU in Talks to Join US-Led Alliance to Secure Tech Supply Chains
title_cn: 欧盟正在谈判加入美国领导的联盟以确保技术供应链安全
summary: The European Union is working to join a US-led initiative aimed at securing supply chains for artificial intelligence and semiconductors as competition with China intensifies.

title: Dimon Warns Bank Taxes May Scrap JPMorgan's New London HQ
title_cn: 戴蒙警告银行税可能会毁掉摩根大通的伦敦新总部
summary: Jamie Dimon warns the UK that any move to hike taxes on banks in the event Keir Starmer is replaced as the UK’s prime minster would see JPMorgan scrap plans to invest billions in a new London headquarters in Canary Wharf. He speaks with Francine Lacqua on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Truce Fragile as US Rejects Tehran’s Latest Offer
title_cn: 美国拒绝德黑兰的最新提议，伊朗战争停战协议脆弱
summary: US President Donald Trump is showing signs of frustration at a lack of progress in negotiations to end the 10-week war with Iran, as the Strait of Hormuz remains all but closed to vital energy supplies and oil prices continue to rise.

title: Iran War Truce Fragile as US Rejects Tehran’s Latest Offer
title_cn: 美国拒绝德黑兰的最新提议，伊朗战争停战协议脆弱
summary:
US President Donald Trump is showing signs of frustration at a lack of progress in negotiations to end the 10-week war with Iran.
After rejecting Iran’s latest offer, Trump told reporters the response from Tehran was a “piece of garbage” and said the ceasefire was on “life support.”
Becca Wasser, Bloomberg Economics Defense Lead, discusses the latest with the uneasy stalemate and what comes next if neither side is willing to make concessions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Greenland PM Says US Talks Hampered by Danish Political Snag
title_cn: 格陵兰岛总理表示丹麦政治障碍阻碍了美国谈判
summary: Diplomatic talks with the US over Greenland have been complicated by Denmark’s lack of a mandated government, according to the island’s prime minister.

title: Putin Vows to Deploy Sarmat Missile After Succesful Test
title_cn: 普京誓言在成功测试后部署“萨尔马特”导弹
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin said the country will deploy its nuclear-capable Sarmat intercontinental ballistic missile by the end of the year, as Moscow and Kyiv resumed strikes following a short-term ceasefire.

title: UK's Starmer Faces Labour Party Rebellion
title_cn: 英国斯塔默面临工党叛乱
summary:
Embattled UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer appeared to buy himself a reprieve from efforts to oust him, after a high-stakes Cabinet meeting that ended with a public show of support from a handful of key allies. 
Jordan Rochester, Head of FICC Strategy at Mizuho EMEA, discusses the how the markets are reacting to the Labour Party rift. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Solar Manufacturers File Trade Dispute Against Ethiopia
title_cn: 美国太阳能制造商对埃塞俄比亚提起贸易争端
summary: Eight US solar manufacturing firms filed a request with the Department of Commerce on Tuesday to investigate alleged unfair trade practices by companies assembling solar cells and panels in Ethiopia with components from China.

title: Starmer Dares UK Challengers to Take Him On in Play for Time
title_cn: 斯塔默鼓励英国挑战者在比赛中与他较量
summary: Embattled UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer appeared to buy himself a reprieve from efforts to oust him, after a high-stakes Cabinet meeting that ended with a public show of support from a handful of key allies.

title: What to Expect From the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing
title_cn: 对北京特习会有何期待
summary: President Donald Trump will be the first US leader in almost a decade to visit China when he lands in Beijing on Wednesday. His much-anticipated summit with President Xi Jinping — delayed from March due to the Iran war — offers the leaders of the world’s two largest economies a chance to reset personal ties and look for common ground on trade, technology and a range of other contentious topics.

title: Trump Praises Griffin, Warns Mamdani Not to ‘Tax People Out’
title_cn: 特朗普赞扬格里芬，警告马姆达尼不要“向人们征税”
summary: President Donald Trump urged New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani to do more to satisfy Ken Griffin, saying that it’s “not recoverable” for the city to lose business figures like him.

title: Wes Streeting, Long Tipped to Be UK PM, May Finally Get His Shot
title_cn: 韦斯·斯特里廷（Wes Streeting）有望成为英国首相，他可能终于如愿了
summary: As Keir Starmer’s premiership hung in the balance over the weekend, his health secretary, Wes Streeting, was engaged in some escapism.

title: UAE Is Said to Have Hit Iran Earlier in War as Israel Ties Grow
title_cn: 据称，随着以色列关系的发展，阿联酋在战争早期袭击了伊朗
summary: The United Arab Emirates retaliated against Iranian attacks on its territory earlier in the war in the Middle East, according to people familiar with the matter, coordinating with Israel as the two countries deepen security ties.

title: Mamdani Scraps Planned NYC Property Tax Hike in Budget Plan
title_cn: 马姆达尼在预算计划中取消了纽约市财产税上调计划
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has ditched his plan to raise New Yorkers’ property taxes — an unpopular measure he threatened to use to help close a two-year deficit.

title: US Colleges Report 20% Drop in Foreign Students Over Visa Clampdown
title_cn: 美国大学报告称，由于签证限制，外国学生数量下降了 20%
summary: The number of new foreign undergraduate students at US colleges dropped by an average of 20% this spring from a year earlier, according to a study by a coalition of education groups, the latest sign that President Donald Trump’s standoff with higher education is hammering a key source of talent and funding.

title: UK 30-Year Yields Hit 1998 Levels as Political Crisis Deepens
title_cn: 随着政治危机加深，英国 30 年期国债收益率触及 1998 年水平
summary: The UK bond market tumbled, driving long-term bond yields back to the highest in nearly three decades, as speculation over Keir Starmer’s future as prime minister renewed concern about the weakened state of Britain’s finances.

title: World’s Most Important Relationship Tested by Trump-Xi Meeting
title_cn: 特习会考验世界上最重要的关系
summary:
One of the most important relationships in global politics will be back in the spotlight later this week when President Donald Trump meets with China's Xi Jinping.

Rebecca Choong Wilkins explains the long, complicated rapport between both leaders (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Poland Playing Down Iran War Inflation Hit, Fiscal Watchdog Says
title_cn: 财政监管机构称波兰淡化伊朗战争造成的通胀打击
summary: Poland’s fiscal watchdog said the Finance Ministry has underestimated the impact on the economy from the Middle East conflict and recommended a revision in inflation forecast that underpins budget planning.

title: Hegseth Grilled on Defense Spending as Iran War Drags On
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争的继续，赫格塞斯对国防开支提出质疑
summary: Lawmakers with oversight of Pentagon spending pressed Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Tuesday over the growing costs of the Iran war, as President Donald Trump suggested a fragile ceasefire with Tehran could break down.

title: UK's Starmer Defies Growing Pressure to Step Down
title_cn: 英国斯塔默顶住越来越大的辞职压力
summary: Keir Starmer defied widespread calls for him to quit as UK prime minister, telling his cabinet he won’t step down without a leadership fight. Dozens of MPs joined calls for him to set out a timetable for his departure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Faces Emboldened Xi in China as Iran War Clips US Leverage
title_cn: 伊朗战争削弱了美国的影响力，特朗普在中国面临着更加大胆的习近平
summary: Donald Trump is expecting economic deals and a “wild” welcome this week in China. In reality, he’ll arrive facing an emboldened Xi Jinping, just as his own hand is constrained by the conflict in Iran.

title: Labour Groups Pitch Rival Economic Plans With Starmer on Brink
title_cn: 工党团体提出竞争性经济计划，斯塔默濒临崩溃
summary: Two major groups from alternative wings of the Labour Party set out detailed economic policy plans in a bid to shape the future direction of the UK government as Keir Starmer fights for survival.

title: Ukraine Probes Officials in Anti-Graft Real Estate Case
title_cn: 乌克兰调查反腐房地产案官员
summary: Ukraine’s anti-corruption watchdog expanded a case against people close to Volodymyr Zelenskiy, threatening another political scandal over high-level graft just as the president seeks to get peace talks with Russia back on track.

title: Macron Seeks to Recast France-Africa Ties With $27 Billion Push
title_cn: 马克龙寻求270亿美元推动重塑法非关系
summary: The France-Africa summit has mobilized billions of euros in investment deals, which President Emmanuel Macron said showed a pivot away from financial aid to investment for the continent.

title: Russia’s Oil Flows Slide as Drone, Storm Alerts Disrupt Key Port
title_cn: 无人机和风暴警报扰乱关键港口，俄罗斯石油流量下滑
summary: Only one Russian crude cargo was loaded at Novorossiysk on the Black Sea last week

title: The Labour Contenders to Be Prime Minister If Starmer Resigns
title_cn: 如果斯塔默辞职，工党将成为首相候选人
summary: A rebellion in Britain’s ruling Labour Party put Keir Starmer on the brink of being forced from office, following a terrible performance in local elections. Labour lost around 1,500 council seats in England, with Nigel Farage’s populist Reform UK enjoying widespread success across the country.
